title: Thinking Machines wants to build an AI that actually listens while it talks
content: Right now, every AI model you've ever used works the same way. You talk, it listens. It responds, you listen. Thinking Machines is trying to change that by building a model that processes your input a

title: Riding an AI rally, Robinhood preps second retail venture IPO
content: Robinhood files confidentially for its second venture fund, this time targeting growth and early-stage startups.

title: GM just laid off hundreds of IT workers to hire those with stronger AI skills
content: Some of the positions focus on AI-native development, data engineering and analytics, cloud-based engineering, and agent and model development as well as prompt engineering and new AI workflows.

title: Finally, texts between Android and iPhone users can be end-to-end encrypted
content: Google had urged Apple for years to support RCS texting to make communication between each company's devices more seamless.

title: Daniel Ek-backed defense tech Helsing to raise $1.2B at $18B valuation
content: Five-year old European military drone startup Helsing is close to raising another monster round.

title: Bravo is creating unscripted microdramas for the Peacock app
content: As microdrama apps like ReelShort and DramaBox quietly rake in billions, Peacock announced on Monday that it is launching two unscripted Bravo microdramas, which will stream in the Peacock app.

title: Digg tries again, this time as an AI news aggregator
content: In an email to beta testers, the company said the site's goal is to "track the most influential voices in a space" and to surface the news that's actually worth "paying attention to."

title: ‘Too early’ to talk IPO, Redwood Materials’ incoming CFO says
content: The battery-recycling and energy-storage company has hired former Tesla finance chief Deepak Ahuja, reuniting him with former Tesla CTO JB Straubel.

title: NYT’s Wordle to become a TV game show
content: This will be the first time that The Times has collaborated with a TV broadcaster for an entertainment-based program, representing yet another pivot in the media company's attempt to build a sustainab

title: TikTok launches an ad-free subscription plan in the UK
content: Users who sign up for the plan won’t see ads on TikTok, and their data won’t be used for advertising purposes.

title: There aren’t enough rockets for space data centers — Cowboy Space raised $275M to build them
content: The apparently insatiable demand for AI compute has data center entrepreneurs looking to the stars. There's a key problem: There aren't enough rockets to put data centers in orbit around Earth, and th

title: Discord launches Nitro Rewards, giving subscribers access to the base tier of Xbox Game Pass for no extra cost
content: Discord's Nitro Rewards program will give Nitro subscribers access to Xbox Game Pass and discounts from Logitech, SteelSeries, and other gaming brands.

title: Venmo’s biggest makeover in years comes at a very interesting time
content: The timing is notable. PayPal, which owns Venmo, is restructuring to spin Venmo off as a stand-alone business unit — a move widely seen as laying the groundwork for a potential sale. Stripe has report

title: Korea’s biggest manufacturers back Config, the TSMC of robot data
content: Instead of building robots themselves, the team is focused on a simpler goal — providing data that robots need to learn and operate. They believe that better data will be key to making robots more use

title: Get ready for the whisper-filled office of the future
content: How will work setups change if we spend more and more time talking to our computers?

title: Anthropic says ‘evil’ portrayals of AI were responsible for Claude’s blackmail attempts
content: Fictional portrayals of artificial intelligence can have a real effect on AI models, according to Anthropic.

title: Uber has always wanted to be more than a ride; now it has reason to hurry
content: The company has been trying to embed itself inside the AV industry — as a data provider, an investor, and a distribution platform — but the consumer-facing bet may be just as important.

title: TechCrunch Mobility: Lime’s IPO gamble
content: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

title: We’re feeling cynical about xAI’s big deal with Anthropic
content: On the latest episode of the Equity podcast, we discussed what xAI's deal with Anthropic might mean for parent company SpaceX.

title: The hottest place for startups to strike a deal? The F1 paddock
content: F1 Grands Prix have emerged as a new place to see and be seen if you are a founder or investor.
